Kamsi — Requirement 1

Slow-Moving Product Visibility

Which products have low sales but high current stock and need SEO/product visibility attention?  ·  Website: https://ledsone.co.uk/  ·  Requested by: Kamsi  ·  Last updated: 2026-07-06
Sales window: 2026-04-07 → 2026-07-06 (90 days) Rule: Units Sold (90d) < 10 AND Current Stock > 100 → Slow-Moving Sources: Shopify only — catalog · orders · inventory (Admin API) Units Sold (90d), Current Stock, and Last Order Date are sourced from Shopify.

All 13,866 products
SKU Page URL Category Units Sold (90d) Current Stock Last Order Date Status

Notes & Methodology

Product list: 13,866 active SKUs — the FULL Shopify Admin catalog (every product and variant), exported via a Shopify bulk operation on 2026-07-06 through the Shopify connector (read-only). Category = Shopify product type (lightly normalised for case/underscores). Non-ACTIVE (draft/archived) variants excluded (598 rows) because their pages are not publicly visible.
Data source note: Units Sold (90d), Current Stock, and Last Order Date are sourced from Shopify (Admin API bulk exports, read-only, 2026-07-06). PostgreSQL is no longer used for these fields (source migration approved in Kamsi Req 1 update, 2026-07-06).
Units Sold (90d) & Last Order Date: Shopify order line items from all orders created in 2026-04-07 → 2026-07-06 (90 days), cancelled orders excluded (order.cancelledAt), quantity summed per SKU; Last Order Date = latest non-cancelled order date per SKU. SKUs with no Shopify order in the window show 0 and "—".
Current Stock: Shopify sellable/available inventory per SKU (ProductVariant.inventoryQuantity — available quantity across all Shopify locations), snapshot 2026-07-06. PostgreSQL warehouse stock is NOT used. 0 SKUs without a Shopify inventory record show "—" and are never classified Slow-Moving (stock unknown ≠ stock > 100).
Status rule (verbatim from requirement): Units Sold (90d) < 10 AND Current Stock > 100 → Slow-Moving, otherwise Active.
Seasonal Tag: column removed on Kuberan's instruction (2026-07-03) — no reliable seasonal field exists in Shopify (tags are promotional campaign labels).
Data files: reports/Kamsi/data/2026-07-06_kamsi_req1_* · Builder: 2026-07-06_kamsi_req1_page_builder.py (rerun to regenerate).
